heading: Certification by manufacturer of conformity of manufactured home with standards; form and placement of certification
label: 5415 Certification by manufacturer of conformity of manufactured home with standards; form and placement of certification
text: Every manufacturer of manufactured homes shall furnish to the distributor or retailer at the time of delivery of each such manufactured home produced by such manufacturer certification that such manufactured home conforms to all applicable Federal construction and safety standards. Such certification shall be in the form of a label or tag permanently affixed to each such manufactured home.
notes: CodificationReferences to “mobile homes”, wherever appearing in text, changed to “manufactured homes” in view of the amendment of title VI of the Housing and Community Development Act of 1974 (this chapter) by requiring the substitution of “manufactured home” for “mobile home” wherever appearing in title VI of the Housing and Community Development Act of 1974, and (set out as a note under , Banks and Banking) providing that the terms “mobile home” and “manufactured home” shall be deemed to include the terms “mobile homes” and “manufactured homes”, respectively.section 308(c)(4) of Pub. L. 96–399section 339B(c) of Pub. L. 97–35section 1703 of Title 12
